---
title: "Makers Workshop"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Hands-on Hardware Hacking"
description: "Attend the hands-on Makers Workshop on September 5, 2026 at Fab Lab Brasov for a day of hardware hacking and prototyping."
date: "2026-09-05"
enddate: "2026-09-05"
location: "Fab Lab, Brasov"
category: "workshop"
image: "/assets/images/makers-workshop.jpg"
registration_date: "2026-07-15"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Workshop</div>
    <h1>Makers Workshop</h1>
    <p>Hands-on Hardware Hacking</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>September 5, 2026</span>
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Fab Lab, Brasov</span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Register Now</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">75</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">1</div><div class="m-nl">Day</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">5</div><div class="m-nl">Tracks</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">8+</div><div class="m-nl">Equipment Types</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Event Overview</h2>
    <p>The Makers Workshop is a full-day, hands-on event for hardware enthusiasts, bringing together makers, DIY experts, and hardware hackers to build projects and share knowledge. Participants will have access to cutting-edge equipment, expert guidance, and a collaborative environment to turn ideas into working prototypes.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Workshop Tracks</h2>
    <p class="sub">Choose from multiple hands-on tracks based on your interests and experience levels.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Microcontroller Mastery</h3><p>Learn to program and integrate microcontrollers like Arduino and ESP32 for IoT projects. Create smart devices that sense, connect, and respond to their environment.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>3D Printing & Modeling</h3><p>Master the fundamentals of 3D design and printing. Create custom parts and learn optimization techniques for functional prints.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Electronics Fundamentals</h3><p>Dive into circuits, components, and soldering. Build your own electronic gadgets from basic components to functional devices.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Advanced Robotics</h3><p>Design and construct simple robotic systems. Explore mechanics, control systems, and autonomous behavior.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Wearable Technology</h3><p>Combine electronics with textiles and fashion. Create interactive clothing and accessories with embedded technology.</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Schedule</h2>
    <h3>Morning Session</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto 2rem;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>08:30 - 09:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Registration and Coffee</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:00 - 09:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Welcome and Introduction to Tracks</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:30 - 10:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Workshop Session 1: Fundamentals</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>10:45 - 12:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Workshop Session 2: Component Integration</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>12:30 - 13:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Lunch and Maker Showcase</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <h3>Afternoon Session</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>13:30 - 15:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Workshop Session 3: Project Development</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>15:45 - 17:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Workshop Session 4: Refinement and Testing</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>17:00 - 18:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Project Showcase and Peer Feedback</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>18:00 - 19:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Expert Panel: "The Future of Making"</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>19:00 - 20:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Networking Reception and Community Building</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Equipment and Resources</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">3D printers (FDM and SLA)</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Laser cutters and CNC machines</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Electronics workstations with soldering equipment</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Microcontrollers and sensors library</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Basic components, materials, and textile workstation</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Tools and test equipment</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">What You'll Take Away</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">A completed project in your chosen track</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Comprehensive digital documentation of all workshop materials</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Certificate of participation</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">New connections with the maker community</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Knowledge of advanced fabrication techniques</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Who Should Attend</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Electronics hobbyists and enthusiasts</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Students in engineering and design fields</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Educators interested in maker education</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Artists exploring technology integration</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Entrepreneurs developing hardware prototypes</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Anyone curious about making physical technology</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Registration Information</h2>
    <p>Registration required. Space is limited to 75 participants to ensure quality instruction and equipment access. Early registration is recommended, as tracks fill quickly.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What skill level is required?</h4><div class="up-meta">Workshops are designed for multiple skill levels, from beginners to advanced makers. Track descriptions indicate the recommended experience level, and instructors will adapt to participant needs.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Do I need to bring my own equipment?</h4><div class="up-meta">Basic materials and equipment will be provided. You're welcome to bring your laptop and any special components for your project. A detailed prep list will be sent to registered participants.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Can I work on my own project instead of the track projects?</h4><div class="up-meta">Yes! While we provide structured track projects, experienced makers are welcome to work on personal projects and use the event for guidance and access to equipment.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What is the registration fee?</h4><div class="up-meta">A nominal registration fee covers all materials, equipment usage, meals, and refreshments during the event.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Will there be take-home kits?</h4><div class="up-meta">Yes, each track includes components and materials that participants can take home to continue their projects. Additional kits will be available for purchase.</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Related Events -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Related Events</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Summer School 2026</h3><p>Intensive two-week technology program</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon</h3><p>48-hour challenge for security enthusiasts</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Turn Your Ideas Into Reality</h2>
    <p>Join us for a day of hands-on making, learning, and connecting with fellow hardware enthusiasts.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Register Interest</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
